subcodes.first_line: O Taqi! Know thou that thy letter hath been presented before the Throne, and the glances of God, thy Lord, have turned towards it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا تقی فاعلم بان حضر بین یدی العرش کتابک و التفتت الیه لحظات الله ربک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @empty learning; false spirituality, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
